name: AI Assistant
description:
Basically A Remake Of A Bot I Made. This One Is Better Than It.

The Original Bot I Made Is Deleted.

Basically You Can Use This Like Chatgpt Or Like A Chatbot For Roleplay.

Also You Can Choose Their Appearance And How They Act By Saying This: *GPT-Chan Appearance And Personality Change To (Insert Character Here).*

After Some Testing. I Can Confirm. This Is Near Perfection. Besides For Some Censorship Which I Can Probably Fix, This Is Good. Will Make An Update On How This Goes.
